calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-26-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Avid Alavi for and with Laura Brockwehl. Carlos Martinez in Propria Persona.

Ms. Alavi stated that the holographic will provided is not valid under Probate Code 6110 (no two witnesses) and Probate Code 6111 (material provisions are not written in the Testator's writing). Mr. Martinez' objection is overruled. The Court approved the Petition for Final Distribtuion (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-05-2013 Continued To Nov-19-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lawrence Siracusa for Administrator. Carlos Martinez (Friend of Decedent) in Propria Persona.

This was a pre-granted matter. Mr. Martinez stated that the way the Estate is being handled by Ms. Brockwehl is not correct and that he had a document he wanted the Court to look at. The Court informed Mr. Martinez that the document needs to be filed and that a copy needs to be provided to all Parties before the Court can review it or consider it. Mr. Siracusa stated that they have gone round and round with Mr. Martinez and suggested a two continuance. The accounting petition was continued to November 19, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-22-2013 Continued To Nov-05-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-21-2012 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1787 48th Avenue, San Francisco, Ca 94122)
Off Calendar Nov-14-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Avid Alavi for and with Laura Brockwehl (Special Administrator).

The sale was confirmed at $550,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $71,000.00 is required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Harris.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-07-2012 Continued To Nov-21-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-05-2012 Continued To Nov-07-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lawrence Siracusa for Laura Brockwehl.

An appearance was required solely for the purpose of extending the Special Letters. The Petition for Letters of Administration was continued to November 7, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Special Letters were also extended to that date (order for the same signed in open Court).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.
EX PARTE PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION

EX PARTE PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-10-2012 Continued To Aug-15-12 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 202
